## Protocol area

Actor card / task contract / lifecycle transition / artifact / evidence / workflow bundle / pilot readiness / validator / docs

## Proposed change

Describe the change in concrete terms.

## Example impact

Which synthetic examples should change or be added?

## Validator impact

Which validator should accept or reject this change?

## Safety boundary

Confirm that this proposal does not require real resident data, private property data, access tokens, camera/sensor payloads, payment data, or real robot logs.
